title: Industry Knowledge File
description: JSON Schema for BABOK Analyst industry knowledge files. Defines structure for manufacturing, distribution, services, and other industry profiles.

description.description: Narrative description of the industry, typical company profile, and revenue range

processes.description: List of key business processes in this industry

description.description: Detailed description of the process scope, departments involved, and key activities

kpis.description: Key Performance Indicators with baseline and target values for this industry

baseline.description: Typical baseline value for mid-market companies in this industry

unit.description: Unit of measurement including description of what is being measured

pain_points.description: Common pain points and challenges in this industry relevant to IT and process improvement projects

typical_systems.description: List of commonly used IT systems in this industry, organized by system category

regulatory_considerations.description: Key regulatory requirements and compliance considerations specific to this industry
